statement_assertions.note: Trino startup SET; must not error
Executor routes to SelectMaxSnapshot handler which returns column 'max'

statement_assertions.sql_pattern: SELECT table_id, schema_id, table_name FROM ducklake_table
SELECT column_id, table_id, column_name, data_type, column_index, is_nullable FROM ducklake_column
statement_assertions.note: Executor returns full column schema; physical names are column_type/column_order/nulls_allowed

statement_assertions.sql_pattern: SELECT data_file_id, table_id, path, file_format, row_count, file_size_bytes, snapshot_id FROM ducklake_data_file

statements: INSERT INTO ducklake_snapshot (snapshot_id, author, message) VALUES ($1, $2, $3)
INSERT INTO ducklake_schema (schema_id, schema_name, begin_snapshot) VALUES ($1, $2, $3)
INSERT INTO ducklake_table (table_id, schema_id, table_name, begin_snapshot) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4)
INSERT INTO ducklake_column (column_id, table_id, column_name, data_type, column_index, is_nullable, begin_snapshot) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7)

compatibility_notes.catalog_discovery: Supported via ducklake_schema and ducklake_table tables
compatibility_notes.predicate_pushdown: File pruning expectations met via ducklake_data_file MVCC filter
compatibility_notes.write_path: Supported via standard DuckLake INSERT protocol
compatibility_notes.trino_400_431_status: Untested; Trino 400-431 connector API may differ; docs downgraded to 'untested'
compatibility_notes.presto_status: Untested; not in supported compatibility matrix
